results.rendered_html:
uddhata p. p.
1 Raised up, elevated, lifted up; lāṃgūlamuddhataṃ dhunvan  Bk. 9. 7 ; ātmoddhatairapi rajobhiḥ  Ś. 1. 8  raised; khura˚  R. 9. 50 , heaved;  Ki. 8. 53. 
2 Excessive, very much, exceeding.
3 Haughty, vain, puffed up; akṣavadhoddhataḥ  R. 12. 63. 
4 Harsh;  Śi. 16. 27. 
5 Excited, inflamed, intensified; ˚manobhavarāgā  Ki. 9. 68 , 69 ; madoddhatāḥ pratyanilaṃ viceruḥ  Ku. 3. 31. 
6 Majestic, stately; ill-mannered.
— taḥ A king's wrestler.
Comp.
— manas, -manaska a. high-minded, haughty, proud.
